* The Imperial Families of Ancient Rome By Maxwell Craven. GoogleBooks Settipani identifies her father as Pompeius, consul in 501.
* Alan Cameron. Duke University, Greek, Roman and Byzantine Studies The House of Anastasius. Columbia University, pp 259-276. June 1978. Page 270. Accessed 9 April 2020. <nowiki>https://grbs.library.duke.edu/article/viewFile/7451/4919</nowiki> page 17 of PDF Daughter of Antipatra.[[Category:Pages]]
